title: Artificial intelligence in video games sparks debate: from Epic's enthusiasm to developer skepticism
summary: While Sony and Epic Games defend the potential of AI, analysts and former executives warn about cost increases, lack of concrete benefits, and the risk of harming the perception of this technology.

title: GTA 6: pre-order, legal battle and fan obsession with alligator teeth
summary: Rockstar sets GTA 6 pre-orders for June 25, while the court case against the studio progresses with a new setback and fans obsess over a graphical detail about alligator teeth.

title: Bobby Prince, legendary composer of DOOM and Wolfenstein 3D, dies at 81
summary: The musician responsible for the iconic soundtracks of id Software's early titles has died, leaving an indelible legacy in video game history.

title: What are you playing this weekend? Gaming newsrooms share their games
summary: Various outlets like Nintendo Life, Eurogamer, and Rock Paper Shotgun publish their usual weekly columns in which editors recommend the games they are spending time on.

title: Slay the Spire 2 receives a major patch that fixes a bug that ruined runs
summary: After a detailed eight-hour analysis by a player, developers release an update that fixes the error in the random number generator and improves the game experience.

title: Toy Story 5: sequel troubles loom and Tim Allen returns to voice Buzz Lightyear
summary: The fifth Toy Story installment faces criticism for perpetuating the sequel problem at Pixar, while actor Tim Allen, 73, returns to voice Buzz and the filmmakers ask him to sound less old.

title: Two Point Hospital: Full Health Collection coming to PS5, Xbox Series, and Switch 2
summary: The complete compilation of the popular hospital management simulator, which includes all expansions, is announced for next-generation consoles and the upcoming Nintendo Switch 2.

title: Capcom adds an adorable new outfit in the latest Pragmata update
summary: The anticipated action sci-fi title receives a patch that includes a Scribble outfit, along with other improvements and fixes, as players await its release.

title: Nintendo Switch 2 reaches one year without major exclusives but with a clear plan and great third-party support
summary: Although it has not yet had a game of the caliber of Breath of the Wild, Nintendo's console is distinguished by its defined roadmap and an impressive catalog of third-party games, as shown by the new trailer.

title: Guild Wars 3 will be a more traditional MMO than Guild Wars 2, according to its developers
summary: ArenaNet confirms that the third installment will offer an experience closer to a classic MMO, ensuring that the three games in the franchise will coexist with different offerings.

title: Halo: Campaign Evolved will require an Xbox account and gamertag on PS5, plus PS Plus for co-op
summary: The launch of Halo on PlayStation 5 will come with conditions: players will need a Microsoft account and PS Plus subscription to access features like split-screen.

title: Obsidian Entertainment sued for violating wage laws in California
summary: The studio behind The Outer Worlds 2 is accused of failing to comply with state regulations on wages and working hours in a lawsuit filed in California.

title: Ace Combat 8 impresses in first impressions: the long wait is worth it
summary: Journalists who tried the eighth installment of the aerial combat saga highlight its graphical quality and gameplay, suggesting that the title will meet expectations.

title: Atlus shows gameplay of Persona 4 Revival, slated for release in 2027
summary: The remaster of the classic RPG shows new gameplay images, confirming that the return of Persona 4 will include visual and content improvements.

title: Epic Games announces a complete rebuild of its store with up to 6.5 times better performance
summary: The revamped Epic Games Store promises a faster and smoother experience, with a completely redesigned interface from scratch.

title: World of Warcraft adds variable difficulty to world bosses in Midnight patch 12.1
summary: The WoW Midnight expansion continues experimenting with adjustable difficulty systems, this time applied to elite world bosses.

title: Battle Brothers receives its first substantial patch in a year, adding fearsome swords
summary: The acclaimed indie tactical game gets an update that includes a batch of new swords and balance adjustments.

title: MrBeast to co-write a book to encourage reading among young people
summary: The popular YouTuber and philanthropist announces a book that aims to motivate an entire generation to read, generating great anticipation.

title: Two Point Museum receives a collaboration with Dave the Diver
summary: The cultural management simulator incorporates content from the successful diving game, including new exhibits and themed items.

title: A new restaurant will open at the Nintendo Museum later this year
summary: The Nintendo Museum in Kyoto will feature a new dining service offering themed experiences for visitors.
